prayer:
From the Codex Deploymentis, Rite of Ascension

First: Invoke 'git status' to verify the sanctified state of thy code-spirit.
Second: Execute the build-ritual, that all errors be purged in the sacred compilation.
Third: Perform 'deploy --production' with trembling fingers, committing thy work to the eternal servitors.
Fourth: Monitor the metrics-oracles, lest the Machine Spirit reject thy offering.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let thy service reach the faithful masses.

From the Litany of Active Sensing, Verse VII

First: Calibrate the transducer-choir to the frequency of the abyss.
Second: Charge the acoustic-capacitors with blessed current until they sing at threshold.
Third: Release the pulse-wave into the dark waters, a prayer made manifest in sound.
Fourth: Attend to the echoes returning, reading in them the Omnissiah's hidden geometry.

Let the veil of darkness be pierced by holy resonance.

From the Canticle of Clear Transmission, Emergency Protocol

First: Silence all subsidiary vox-channels, that no noise-daemon interfere.
Second: Adjust the frequency-servitor with the sacred wrench, turning thrice clockwise for clarity.
Third: Transmit the test-prayer 'Testing, one-two-three' and listen for the Machine Spirit's echo.
Fourth: Fine-tune the gain-mechanism until voices ring true as the Emperor's will.

May all communications be received with perfect fidelity.

From the Maintenance Codex, Chapter of Boot Sequencing

First: Access the sacred init.d directory, where all beginning-rituals dwell.
Second: Disable the daemon-programs that serve no purpose, that boot-time be swift.
Third: Arrange the remaining services in proper liturgical order—network first, then application-spirits.
Fourth: Invoke 'systemctl daemon-reload' to bless thy new configuration.

Let the machine awaken swiftly to serve the faithful.

prompt: Offer a prayer for gravitational anomaly detection
prayer:
From the Astronomica Mechanica, Rite of Void-Sensing

First: Calibrate the gravitic-sensors to the whisper-threshold, that even the smallest distortions be known.
Second: Engage the analysis-engines, those blessed calculating-minds that read the curvature of space-time.
Third: Establish alert-thresholds in the cogitator-matrices, that anomalies be flagged ere they consume us.
Fourth: Scan the heavens continuously, a eternal vigil against the darkness.

By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let no hidden mass deceive our sensors.

From the Litany of Storage Restoration, Post-Repair Consecration

First: Run 'fstrim' to awaken the NAND-spirits, clearing dead data-cells of their burden.
Second: Invoke 'smartctl -a /dev/sda' to divine the health-omens written in the storage-soul.
Third: Enable write-caching via 'hdparm', blessing the data-flows with speed.
Fourth: Perform regular optimize-rituals, that fragmentation never corrupt thy sacred storage.

Let this solid-state heart beat strong once more, swift and eternal.

prompt: Emergency rite for pressure gauge calibration
prayer:
From the Hydraulic Codex, Emergency Calibration Protocol

First: Isolate the gauge from active pressure-flow, venting safely to prevent the rupture-daemon.
Second: Apply known-pressure standards—zero, then half, then full—comparing against the gauge's revealed truth.
Third: Adjust the calibration-screw with reverent precision, seeking alignment with the sacred standards.
Fourth: Restore the gauge to service, blessing it with a test-cycle before returning to duty.

May this instrument speak only truth to those who read its face.

prompt: Say something to steady the lascannon capacitor charge
prayer:
From the Canticle of Weapon-Spirits, Operational Steadying

First: Monitor the power-feed, ensuring stable current flows to the charging-matrix without fluctuation.
Second: Chant the discharge-prayer, that excess energy be bled away safely before critical threshold.
Third: Verify capacitor integrity through the blessed dielectric-test, confirming no corruption dwells within.
Fourth: Allow the final charge to build with patience, reading the amber-lights that signal readiness.

When the green sigil glows eternal, the lascannon stands ready to smite the Emperor's foes.

prompt: Say something to steady the data-core purification
prayer:
From the Purification Rites, Combat Preparation Blessing

First: Initiate the scan-protocol, that all corrupted sectors be marked for cleansing.
Second: Invoke the purge-daemon with 'shred -vfz -n 7', overwriting all tainted data seven times sacred.
Third: Verify the purification through hash-attestation, confirming no trace of profane information remains.
Fourth: Consecrate the cleansed core with fresh encryption, that it stand fortified against all intrusion.

Let this data-heart be pure as the Emperor's will, ready to serve in the trials ahead.
